symptoms.symptom_name: Fluctuant, pointing tender nodule with pustular tip

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A fluctuant, pointing collection defines a drainable abscess.
Systemic features indicate significant infection with sepsis risk.
Intact swallowing/voice/breathing argues against deep neck-space extension.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Incision and drainage (in person) ± wound swab MC&S
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Definitive treatment of a fluctuant abscess; swab guides antibiotics/identifies MRSA.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Consider bloods if systemically unwell (FBC, CRP)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Assess severity if sepsis is suspected.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Neck imaging only if deep-space infection suspected
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Not needed for a superficial pointing abscess without deep-space features.
